readiness_label: concept/preflight only; not approved for live colony use

gates.label: Qualified keeper review
gates.pass_condition: Packet is labeled concept/preflight only and requires qualified beekeeper review before any live colony use.
gates.fail_remedy: Mark the packet as non-live display only until a qualified local keeper reviews it.

gates.label: Secure containment
gates.pass_condition: Bee paths, doors, seals, frame interfaces, and viewing panels are documented as escape-resistant design requirements.
gates.fail_remedy: Keep the packet at preflight level and redesign closures, gaskets, viewing-panel retention, and service access before live use.

gates.label: Ventilation and thermal management
gates.pass_condition: Packet records airflow path, heat load posture, sun exposure limits, emergency shade or cooling posture, and unattended-display assumptions.
gates.fail_remedy: Add ventilation and thermal review or reject the proposed viewing location before live use.

gates.label: Escape-proof service access
gates.pass_condition: Inspection, cleaning, and service access do not create uncontrolled bee release into family, shop, school, or public areas.
gates.fail_remedy: Add service protocol constraints or keep the packet as a non-live display.

gates.label: Public and privacy safety
gates.pass_condition: Packet defines public standoff, signage, supervision, and private-detail redaction requirements.
gates.fail_remedy: Redact private family/media details and add public safety boundaries before public release.

gates.label: Route-out colony decisions
gates.pass_condition: Colony sourcing, feeding, disease response, queen status, inspection cadence, overwintering, transport, legal compliance, and live handling are explicitly out of scope.
gates.fail_remedy: Add route-out language to the packet and route these decisions to qualified local beekeeping or project-specific support.

fabrication_authority: Generated images and concept renders are non-authoritative; dimensions must come from CAD/DXF/JSON, design tables, or reviewed drawings.
